signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Unlike others in this space, we do not run sale events across our entire store... we are happy with how the guests responded to both with full-price sales driven by some of our key franchises.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: We really drive and we'll always drive our business through regular price through newness and innovation. Markdowns, we use as a means to clear out end of season.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: The confidence is rooted in a few of the key data points... when I look at our guests, I'm happy with the absolute growth number... I feel confident in our growth plans and strategies for 2025.
